title: MilitaryCraft
description: A cool modern, military related modpack that adds... GUNS!!! {It also adds other military related stuff}
body: **MilitaryCraft** is a high-stakes, strategy-driven modpack designed for players who crave tactical warfare and advanced military technology. Dive into a world where you command powerful armies, build fortified bases, and engage in intense combat scenarios. With a wide range of weapons, vehicles, and defense systems, MilitaryCraft offers an immersive battlefield experience. From modern tanks and helicopters to advanced drones and missile systems, you'll have all the tools necessary to dominate your enemies. Whether you're playing solo or with friends, prepare for an epic military showdown like no other!
